name: dl-chat
description: DL Chat - The Securest Messaging App by DEATH LEGION Team

scripts.deploy:web: cd apps/web && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name dl-chat
scripts.deploy:admin: cd apps/admin && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name dl-chat-admin
scripts.build:mobile: cd apps/mobile && eas build --platform android --profile apk
